1.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), the wife of the Prophet ﷺ, that she was asked about the ritual bath of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ after sexual intercourse. She said: "A vessel would be brought to him and he would wash his hands three times. He would then pour from the vessel onto his private part and wash it. He would then pour water with his right hand onto his left hand and wash it. Then he would rinse his mouth and nose, wash his face three times, then pour water over his head three times, then wash the rest of his body."
1.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), istri Nabi ﷺ, bahwa ia ditanya tentang mandi junub Rasulullah ﷺ. Ia berkata: "Sebuah wadah dibawakan kepada beliau dan beliau mencuci tangannya tiga kali. Kemudian beliau menuangkan dari wadah ke kemaluannya dan mencucinya. Kemudian beliau menuangkan air dengan tangan kanannya ke tangan kirinya dan mencucinya. Kemudian beliau berkumur dan menghirup air ke hidung, mencuci wajahnya tiga kali, kemudian menuangkan air ke atas kepalanya tiga kali, lalu mencuci seluruh tubuhnya."

2.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded one of his wives, when she was menstruating, to wrap a lower garment around herself and he would lie with her.
2.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan salah satu istrinya, ketika ia haid, untuk mengikat kain bawah di sekitar dirinya dan beliau berbaring bersamanya.

3.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I used to twist the garlands for the sacrificial animals of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ from wool, and he would then refrain from nothing that is not forbidden."
3.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku biasa menganyam kalung-kalung hewan kurban Rasulullah ﷺ dari wol, dan beliau kemudian tidak menahan diri dari apa pun yang tidak diharamkan."

4.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I used to be in front of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while he was praying. When I wanted to get up, I disliked passing in front of him, so I would slip away gradually."
4.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku biasa berada di depan Rasulullah ﷺ sementara beliau shalat. Ketika aku ingin berdiri, aku tidak suka melintas di depan beliau, maka aku perlahan-lahan menyelinap pergi."

5.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when asked about the prayer of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, she said: "It was constant and continuous."
5.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ditanya tentang shalat Rasulullah ﷺ, ia berkata: "Itu adalah amalan yang terus-menerus dan konsisten."

6.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to be intimate with his wife while he was fasting.
6.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mencium istrinya dalam keadaan berpuasa.

7.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the wife of Abu Hudhayfah said: "O Messenger of Allah, Salim enters my home and he is now a man, and there is something in the heart of Abu Hudhayfah about it." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Suckle him so that he may enter your home."
7.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa istri Abu Hudzaifah berkata: "Wahai Rasulullah, Salim masuk ke rumahku dan sekarang ia sudah dewasa, dan ada sesuatu di hati Abu Hudzaifah tentang itu." Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Susuilah dia agar ia boleh masuk ke rumahmu."

8.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), the Mother of the Believers, that she said: "The Prophet ﷺ commanded us, when one of us was menstruating, to wrap a lower garment around herself and then come under the blanket with him."
8.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), Ummul Mukminin, bahwa ia berkata: "Nabi ﷺ memerintahkan kami, ketika salah satu dari kami haid, untuk mengikat kain bawah di sekitar dirinya kemudian masuk bersamanya dalam selimut."

9.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ was not indecent, nor did he behave indecently, nor was he loud and raucous in the marketplaces. He did not repay evil with its like, but rather he would pardon and forgive."
9.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ tidak keji, tidak pula berperilaku keji, tidak pula ribut dan gaduh di pasar-pasar. Beliau tidak membalas keburukan dengan keburukan yang serupa, melainkan beliau memaafkan dan mengampuni."

10.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the Messenger of Allah ﷺ came to her and found a man with her, he seemed displeased. She said: "He is my foster-brother." He said: "Be careful of who your foster-brothers are, for fosterage is established only by hunger."
10.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Rasulullah ﷺ datang kepadanya dan mendapati seorang laki-laki bersamanya, beliau tampak tidak senang. Ia berkata: "Dia adalah saudara sesusuanku." Beliau bersabda: "Perhatikanlah siapa saudara sesusuan kalian, karena sesungguhnya susuan itu hanya ditetapkan karena lapar."

11.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about the punishment of the grave, and he said: "Yes, the punishment of the grave is real." She said: "After that, I never saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ pray any prayer except that he sought refuge from the punishment of the grave."
11.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang azab kubur, dan beliau bersabda: "Ya, azab kubur itu nyata." Ia berkata: "Setelah itu, aku tidak pernah melihat Rasulullah ﷺ shalat apa pun kecuali beliau berlindung dari azab kubur."

12.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a freed slave of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ died. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ was brought his inheritance, and he asked: "Is there anyone here from his village?" They said: "Yes." He said: "Give it to them."
12.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang budak yang dimerdekakan Rasulullah ﷺ meninggal. Rasulullah ﷺ dibawakan warisannya, dan beliau bertanya: "Adakah di sini seseorang dari desanya?" Mereka berkata: "Ya." Beliau bersabda: "Berikan kepadanya."

13.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when Ibn Umar refused to use perfume before entering ihram, she said: "May Allah have mercy on Abu Abd al-Rahman. I used to perfume the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and he would then visit all his wives, and in the morning he was in ihram with the perfume still gleaming."
13.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Ibnu Umar menolak menggunakan wewangian sebelum masuk ihram, ia berkata: "Semoga Allah merahmati Abu Abdurrahman. Aku biasa memakaikan wewangian kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan beliau kemudian mengunjungi semua istrinya, dan di pagi harinya beliau dalam keadaan ihram dengan wewangian yang masih memancar."

14.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she confirmed the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to fast on specific days of the month.
14.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia mengkonfirmasi Rasulullah ﷺ biasa berpuasa pada hari-hari tertentu dalam sebulan.

15.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she asked the Prophet ﷺ: "I have two neighbors — to which one should I give a gift?" He said: "To the one whose door is closest to you."
15.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ: "Aku memiliki dua tetangga — kepada yang mana aku harus memberi hadiah?" Beliau bersabda: "Kepada yang pintunya paling dekat denganmu."

16.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "I was given a command but I saw the people hesitating. Had I known at the outset what I came to know later, I would not have brought sacrificial animals with me until I bought them, then entered ihram as they did."
16.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Aku diperintahkan dengan suatu perintah tetapi aku melihat orang-orang ragu-ragu. Seandainya aku tahu sejak awal apa yang aku ketahui belakangan, aku tidak akan membawa hewan kurban bersamaku hingga aku membelinya, kemudian berihram sebagaimana mereka berihram."

17.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding Barirah: "Do not buy her unless you can take her wala (patronage), for wala belongs only to the one who emancipates." She also gave Barirah a choice regarding her husband. When meat from her charity was brought to the Prophet ﷺ, he said: "It is charity for her and a gift for us."
17.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai Barirah: "Jangan membelinya kecuali kamu bisa mengambil wala-nya (perwaliannya), karena wala hanya milik orang yang memerdekakan." Ia juga memberi Barirah pilihan mengenai suaminya. Ketika daging dari sedekahnya dibawakan kepada Nabi ﷺ, beliau bersabda: "Itu adalah sedekah baginya dan hadiah bagi kami."

18.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "It is as if I can see the glistening of perfume in the parting of the hair of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while he was in the state of ihram."
18.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Seolah-olah aku dapat melihat kilap wewangian di belahan rambut Rasulullah ﷺ sementara beliau dalam keadaan ihram."

19.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she became menstruating and was upset. The Prophet ﷺ said: "May your hair be disheveled, you are detaining us! But had you already performed the tawaf of ifadah on the Day of Sacrifice?" She said: "Yes." He said: "Then set out."
19.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia haid dan merasa sedih. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Semoga rambutmu berantakan, kamu menahan kami! Tetapi apakah kamu sudah melakukan tawaf ifadah pada Hari Nahr?" Ia berkata: "Ya." Beliau bersabda: "Kalau begitu berangkatlah."

20.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'There is no Muslim who is pricked by a thorn or anything greater except that Allah the Almighty raises him a degree because of it or removes from him a sin because of it.'"
20.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak ada seorang Muslim pun yang tertusuk duri atau sesuatu yang lebih dari itu kecuali Allah Yang Maha Mulia mengangkatnya satu derajat karenanya atau menghapuskan darinya suatu dosa karenanya.'"

21.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ leaned toward me to kiss me and I said: 'I am fasting.' He said: 'And I am fasting,' and he kissed me."
21.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ condong ke arahku untuk menciumku dan aku berkata: 'Aku sedang berpuasa.' Beliau bersabda: 'Dan aku pun berpuasa,' lalu beliau menciumku."

22.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was asked: "Which deed is most beloved to Allah?" He said: "The most consistent one, even if it is little." And he also said: "Take on of deeds only what you are able to sustain."
22.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ditanya: "Amalan apa yang paling dicintai Allah?" Beliau bersabda: "Yang paling konsisten, meskipun sedikit." Dan beliau juga bersabda: "Ambillah dari amalan-amalan hanya yang mampu kalian pertahankan."

23.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray while she was between him and the qiblah — and she was menstruating.
23.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat sementara ia berada di antara beliau dan arah kiblat — dan ia sedang haid.

24.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that during the illness in which the Messenger of Allah ﷺ died, while he was hoarse, he kept saying: "'With those upon whom Allah has bestowed favor — the prophets, the truthful, the martyrs and the righteous, and excellent are these as companions.'" She said: "I thought then that he was being given a choice."
24.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa selama sakit yang menyebabkan Rasulullah ﷺ wafat, sementara beliau serak, beliau terus mengucapkan: "'Bersama orang-orang yang Allah beri nikmat — para nabi, orang-orang yang benar, para syuhada, dan orang-orang saleh, dan mereka adalah sebaik-baik teman.'" Ia berkata: "Aku mengira saat itu beliau sedang diberikan pilihan."

25.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to say in his bowing: "Subbuhun Quddusun, Rabb al-Mala'ikati wa al-Ruh (Perfect, Holy, Lord of the Angels and the Spirit)."
25.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mengucapkan dalam rukunya: "Subbuhun Quddusun, Rabbul Mala'ikati war Ruh (Maha Suci, Maha Kudus, Rabb para malaikat dan Ruh)."

26.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the Messenger of Allah ﷺ heard the adhan, if he was in a state of ritual impurity he would pour water over himself, and if not he would perform ablution, then go out to the prayer.
26.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Rasulullah ﷺ mendengar adzan, jika beliau dalam keadaan junub beliau menuangkan air ke atas dirinya, dan jika tidak beliau berwudhu, kemudian keluar untuk shalat.

27.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "There was not a day that was his day with me except that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prayed the two rak'ahs after 'Asr in my house."
27.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Tidak ada satu hari pun yang merupakan gilirannya bersamaku kecuali Rasulullah ﷺ shalat dua rakaat setelah Ashar di rumahku."

28.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said to her: "Were it not that your people have only recently left paganism, I would demolish the Ka'bah and give it two doors." When Ibn al-Zubayr held power, he demolished it and gave it two doors.
28.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda kepadanya: "Seandainya bukan karena kaummu baru saja meninggalkan kemusyrikan, aku akan meruntuhkan Ka'bah dan memberinya dua pintu." Ketika Ibnu al-Zubayr berkuasa, ia meruntuhkannya dan memberinya dua pintu.

29.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The deed most beloved to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was that which a person performed consistently."
29.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Amalan yang paling dicintai oleh Rasulullah ﷺ adalah yang seseorang lakukan secara konsisten."

30.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding the Ka'bah that Abd Allah ibn Umar said: "If Aisha truly heard this from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, then I think the Messenger of Allah ﷺ only left off touching the two corners adjacent to the Hijr because the House was not completed on the foundations of Ibrahim (peace be upon him)."
30.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai Ka'bah bahwa Abdullah bin Umar berkata: "Jika Aisyah benar-benar mendengar ini dari Rasulullah ﷺ, maka aku mengira Rasulullah ﷺ hanya meninggalkan mengusap dua sudut yang berdekatan dengan Hijr karena Baitullah tidak diselesaikan di atas pondasi Ibrahim (alaihi salam)."

31.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I began my menses before completing my circuits of the Ka'bah and between al-Safa and al-Marwa. I complained of this to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He said: 'Undo your hair and comb it, enter ihram for Hajj and leave the 'Umrah.' I did so. When we completed the Hajj, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ sent me with Abd al-Rahman ibn Abi Bakr to al-Tan'im, and I performed 'Umrah. He said: 'This is in place of your 'Umrah.'"
31.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku mulai haid sebelum menyelesaikan tawafku mengelilingi Ka'bah dan antara Safa dan Marwa. Aku mengadu kepada Rasulullah ﷺ. Beliau bersabda: 'Uraikan rambutmu dan sisir, masuk ke dalam ihram untuk haji dan tinggalkan umrah.' Aku melakukan itu. Ketika kami menyelesaikan haji, Rasulullah ﷺ mengirimku bersama Abdurrahman bin Abi Bakar ke at-Tan'im, dan aku melakukan umrah. Beliau bersabda: 'Ini sebagai pengganti umrahmu.'"

32.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to the women: "Go out."
32.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepada para wanita: "Keluarlah."

33.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "Aflah, the brother of Abu al-Qu'ays, came seeking permission to enter my home — he was my foster uncle — after the veil had been ordained. I refused to admit him. When the Prophet ﷺ came, I informed him of what I had done, and he commanded me to admit him."
33.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aflah, saudara Abu al-Qu'ays, datang meminta izin untuk masuk ke rumahku — dia adalah paman sesusuan saya — setelah hijab diwajibkan. Aku menolak mengizinkannya masuk. Ketika Nabi ﷺ datang, aku memberitahunya tentang apa yang aku lakukan, dan beliau memerintahkanku untuk mengizinkannya masuk."

34.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Prophet ﷺ never prayed the forenoon voluntary prayer, but I pray it."
34.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Nabi ﷺ tidak pernah shalat sunnah Dhuha, tetapi aku shalat itu."

35.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Abu Jahm ibn Hudhayfah gave the Messenger of Allah ﷺ a Syrian striped garment with decorative borders. He prayed in it, then when he turned away, he said: "Return this striped garment to Abu Jahm. I noticed its decoration during the prayer and it nearly distracted me."
35.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Abu Jahm bin Hudzaifah memberikan Rasulullah ﷺ kain bergaris dari Syam yang memiliki hiasan tepi. Beliau shalat mengenakannya, kemudian ketika beliau berpaling, beliau bersabda: "Kembalikan kain bergaris ini kepada Abu Jahm. Aku memperhatikan hiasannya selama shalat dan hampir membuatku terganggu."

36.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "I saw what you did, and nothing prevented me from coming out to you except that I feared it might be made obligatory for you." This was in Ramadan.
36.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Aku melihat apa yang kalian lakukan, dan tidak ada yang menghalangiku untuk keluar kepada kalian kecuali aku khawatir itu akan diwajibkan atas kalian." Ini terjadi pada bulan Ramadan.

37.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray thirteen rak'ahs at night, then when he heard the call to Fajr he would pray two short rak'ahs."
37.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat tiga belas rakaat di malam hari, kemudian ketika mendengar adzan Subuh beliau shalat dua rakaat yang singkat."

38.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), the wife of the Prophet ﷺ, that she said: "I never saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ pray the night prayer sitting until he grew old. When he grew old, he would recite while sitting, and when he was about to bow he would stand up and recite around thirty or forty verses, then bow."
38.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), istri Nabi ﷺ, bahwa ia berkata: "Aku tidak pernah melihat Rasulullah ﷺ shalat malam dalam keadaan duduk sampai beliau tua. Ketika beliau tua, beliau membaca dalam keadaan duduk, dan ketika hendak ruku beliau berdiri dan membaca sekitar tiga puluh atau empat puluh ayat, kemudian ruku."

39.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), the wife of the Prophet ﷺ, that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray sitting. He would recite while sitting, and when there remained of his recitation enough for him to complete it before ruku, he would stand, recite the remaining portion, then bow.
39.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), istri Nabi ﷺ, bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat dalam keadaan duduk. Beliau membaca dalam keadaan duduk, dan ketika tersisa dari bacaannya cukup untuk diselesaikan sebelum ruku, beliau berdiri, membaca bagian yang tersisa, kemudian ruku.

40.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she dictated to a scribe regarding the verse: "Guard strictly the prayers, and the middle prayer, and the 'Asr prayer, and stand before Allah in devout obedience." She then said: "I heard it thus from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ."
40.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia mendiktekan kepada seorang juru tulis mengenai ayat: "Peliharalah semua shalat-shalat itu, dan shalat wusta, dan shalat Ashar, dan berdirilah untuk Allah dengan penuh kepatuhan." Ia kemudian berkata: "Aku mendengarnya demikian dari Rasulullah ﷺ."

41.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), the wife of the Prophet ﷺ, that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ never prayed the forenoon voluntary prayer, yet I pray it. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to leave off an act he loved to do, for fear that people would make it obligatory upon themselves."
41.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), istri Nabi ﷺ, bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ tidak pernah shalat sunnah Dhuha, namun aku shalat itu. Rasulullah ﷺ biasa meninggalkan suatu amalan yang ia sukai, karena khawatir orang-orang akan mewajibkannya atas diri mereka sendiri."

42.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the Prophet ﷺ was served bread and condiments while a pot of meat was boiling, he asked: "Did I not see a pot with meat in it?" They said: "Yes, O Messenger of Allah, but that is meat given as charity to Barirah and you do not eat charity." The Prophet ﷺ said: "It is charity for her and a gift for us."
42.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Nabi ﷺ dihidangkan roti dan lauk sementara periuk berisi daging sedang mendidih, beliau bertanya: "Bukankah aku melihat periuk berisi daging?" Mereka berkata: "Ya, wahai Rasulullah, tetapi itu adalah daging yang diberikan sebagai sedekah kepada Barirah dan engkau tidak makan sedekah." Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Itu adalah sedekah baginya dan hadiah bagi kami."

43.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when she was asked whether a foster uncle of Hafsa could visit, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Yes. Fosterage makes forbidden what birth makes forbidden."
43.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ditanya apakah paman sesusuan Hafsa boleh berkunjung, Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Ya. Sesusuan mengharamkan apa yang kelahiran haramkan."

44.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), the wife of the Prophet ﷺ, that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray Fajr, and women wrapped in their garments would depart — they could not be recognized because of the darkness before dawn."
44.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), istri Nabi ﷺ, bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat Subuh, dan para wanita yang terbungkus jubah mereka pergi — mereka tidak bisa dikenali karena gelapnya waktu sebelum fajar."

45.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding the incident of the lost necklace that Usayd ibn Hudayr said: "This is not the first blessing from you, O family of Abu Bakr." She said: "We then searched the camel I had been riding and found the necklace beneath it."
45.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai insiden kalung yang hilang bahwa Usaid bin Hudhair berkata: "Ini bukan berkah pertama dari kalian, wahai keluarga Abu Bakar." Ia berkata: "Kami kemudian menggeledah unta yang aku naiki dan menemukan kalung di bawahnya."

46.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to kiss me while he was fasting and I was fasting."
46.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ biasa menciumku dalam keadaan berpuasa dan aku pun berpuasa."

47.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade men and women from public baths, then he permitted men to enter them wearing a lower garment.
47.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang laki-laki dan perempuan dari pemandian umum, kemudian beliau mengizinkan laki-laki untuk memasukinya dengan mengenakan kain bawah.

48.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "O Aisha, a house without dates — its people are hungry."
48.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Wahai Aisyah, rumah yang tidak ada kurmanya — penghuninya kelaparan."

49.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray on a small prayer mat.
49.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat di atas tikar shalat kecil.

50.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ asked her to hand him something and she said she was menstruating. He said: "Your menstruation is not in your hand."
50.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memintanya untuk menyerahkan sesuatu dan ia berkata bahwa ia sedang haid. Beliau bersabda: "Haidmu bukan di tanganmu."
